title: anaphalis margaritacea subsp. margaritacea
intro: Anaphalis margaritacea subsp. margaritacea, also known as the pearl everlasting or arctic everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is native to mountainous regions in Europe, Asia, and North America. The medicinal properties of Anaphalis margaritacea subsp. margaritacea include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system.
